art_news.summary: Global art scene is vibrant. Key events: 'Watering a Black Garden' (Amsterdam), Nihaal Faizal's '(video art)' (NY), 'We Others' and 'Celebrity Skin' (London). Local events include Montpelier Art Walk and Knoxville Museum of Art's 'Knoxville Collects: Susanna Navarro'.

market_summary.note: Markets closed for Good Friday holiday. Previous session saw mixed results: Dow -0.13%, S&P 500 and Nasdaq posted modest gains.
market_summary.market_sentiment: Fragile due to oil prices and Iran conflict concerns.
